Name: Shoulder Shrug
Instructions: Sit straight; raise shoulders toward ears; hold for 3 seconds.

Name: Hand & Wrist Stretch
Instructions: Place palms together; push left hand against right; hold for 3 seconds.
Safety/Contraindications: Stop if experiencing sharp wrist pain.

Name: Seated Marching
Instructions: While seated, lift one knee as if marching; hold for 2 seconds.
Safety/Contraindications: Ensure chair is stable and has a backrest.

Name: Towel Slide
Instructions: Place towel under hand on table; slide forward and back with control.
Safety/Contraindications: Do not force the stretch beyond comfort.

Name: Sit-to-Stand
Instructions: Rise from a seated position to standing using even weight on both legs.
Safety/Contraindications: Use armrests for support if balance is unstable.

Name: Finger Tapping
Instructions: Tap each finger against the thumb in a sequence (index to pinky).

Name: Wall Push-ups
Instructions: Stand facing wall; place palms on wall; lean in and push away.

Name: Squeeze Ball
Instructions: Hold ball in affected hand; squeeze as hard as possible for 5 seconds.

Name: Heel-to-Toe Stand
Instructions: Stand with one foot directly in front of the other (tandem); hold balance.
Safety/Contraindications: Always perform near a grab bar or counter.

Name: Single Leg Stance
Instructions: Lift one leg and stand on the other; hold for as long as possible.
Safety/Contraindications: Avoid if recent fall history exists without a carer.
